targets.query:
from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic_flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> group(columns: ["collector"])

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "dns_query" and r._field == "count")
  |> group(columns: ["domain"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic_flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["src_ip"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r._field == "seen")
  |> group(columns: ["ip", "mac", "name", "hostname", "kind", "source"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "adguard_query" and r._field == "count")
  |> group(columns: ["client_ip", "client_name", "domain", "blocked", "reason"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "adguard_query" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.blocked == "true")
  |> group(columns: ["client_ip", "client_name", "domain", "reason", "rule"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "adguard_query" and r._field == "count")
  |> group(columns: ["client_ip", "client_name"])
  |> count()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
